core_mechanism: nonlinearity-induced localization of a marginal (threshold / non-normalizable) eigenmode of the linearized spectrum into a long-lived, spatially localized time-periodic oscillation (a breather bifurcating from the edge of the continuous spectrum or from an antibound mode)
brief_reason: The abstract identifies the oscillon as a discrete resonant threshold or antibound (non-normalizable) linear mode that gets localized by nonlinearity, i.e. a marginal spectral mode converted into a localized standing oscillation.
